validation.titleMin: Title must be at least 5 characters
validation.descriptionMin: Description must be at least 20 characters
validation.actionsRequired: At least one action is required
validation.actionTitleMin: Action title must be at least 3 characters
validation.actionTitleMax: Action title must not exceed 200 characters
validation.actionDescriptionMin: Action description must be at least 10 characters
validation.actionDescriptionMax: Action description must not exceed 1000 characters
validation.actionLinkInvalid: Link must be a valid URL

errors.forbidden: Access denied. Only administrators can create career scenarios.

errors.noProfile: Profile not found. Please create your profile first.

itJuniorToMiddle.title: Junior to Middle transition
itJuniorToMiddle.description: Growth recommendations: deepen your expertise, practice mentoring, and participate in architecture decisions.

actions.title: Career consultation
actions.description: Book a session with a career coach to assess your current level.

actions.title: System design
actions.description: Study design patterns and approaches for building scalable systems.

itMiddleSystemDesign.title: Middle Engineer system design track
itMiddleSystemDesign.description: A practical recommendation for a middle IT specialist: improve architecture thinking, delivery ownership, and preparation for senior engineering responsibilities.

actions.title: System design notes
actions.description: Document one current project architecture: services, data flow, risks, bottlenecks, and tradeoffs.

actions.title: Senior readiness review
actions.description: Review current skills with a mentor and define the strongest gap before moving toward Senior level.

actions.title: Code review practice
actions.description: Take ownership of regular code reviews and collect examples of architectural feedback you provided.

designMiddleGrowth.title: Middle Designer growth plan
designMiddleGrowth.description: A practical development plan for a middle designer: strengthen product thinking, improve portfolio cases, and prepare for senior-level ownership.

actions.title: Portfolio case audit
actions.description: Rewrite two strongest portfolio cases with problem, process, constraints, decisions, result, and measurable impact.

actions.title: Career review session
actions.description: Discuss the current profile with a mentor and define the gap between Middle and Senior expectations.

actions.title: Design critique practice
actions.description: Join regular critique sessions and present one case to collect structured feedback from other designers.

designMiddleSystems.title: Design systems and product ownership track
designMiddleSystems.description: A focused recommendation for a middle designer: strengthen design systems work, product ownership, research habits, and cross-functional communication.

actions.title: Design system audit
actions.description: Audit the current UI patterns and prepare a list of reusable components, gaps, and consistency problems.

actions.title: Research practice
actions.description: Run or review at least one user interview and turn insights into a clear product design decision.

actions.title: Product ownership plan
actions.description: Prepare a growth plan for taking ownership of a product area, including metrics and stakeholder map.

trigger.consultationStub: Consultation booking will be available in the next release.

roadmap.title: Career Roadmap
roadmap.empty: No roadmap is available for your current profile yet

careerChangeHub.title: Reskilling hub
careerChangeHub.introTitle: You’re not alone on this path
careerChangeHub.introBody: Changing careers after 35 is common. Here you’ll find beginner-friendly materials, internships, and official programs — take it at your own pace and lean on support when you need it.
careerChangeHub.sectionEmpty: Nothing here yet — check back after we add more tagged materials.
careerChangeHub.forbidden: This section is available after you turn on “I’m changing my professional direction” in your profile and save.

aiRisk.title: AI sustainability index
aiRisk.subtitle: Estimated exposure to automation over the next 3–5 years (lookup by your direction and level). Not ML — reference data.
aiRisk.shareText: My AI sustainability index: {{riskLabel}} ({{score}}/100). Direction: {{direction}}, level: {{level}}.
aiRisk.missingSeed: Index data is missing. Run backend seed: npm run seed (from the backend folder).
